leadText: Loop Lagoon (Japanese: 円環の入り江 Circular Bay) is a part of the Isle of Armor in the Galar region. It connects to Courageous Cavern in the north and the Stepping-Stone Sea in the west.

sections.title: Items
sections.text: Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games Sea Incense On the central island Sw Sh TR25 ( Psyshock ) On the shore, near logs Sw Sh Heat Rock Next to a tree near the Courageous Cavern entrance Sw Sh Hidden items [ edit | edit source ] Unless otherwise stated, hidden items in the Isle of Armor regenerate every day. In many of these cases, they can also regenerate as different items. Every item that regenerates every day can also rarely regenerate as a Wishing Piece (at approximately a 1% chance). Item Location Games Galarica Twig Next to a tree near the Courageous Cavern entrance Sw Sh Pearl On the beach shore near the Courageous Cavern entrance tree Sw Sh Dive Ball Stardust On the same beach, next to a wanderer Sw Sh Soft Sand Pearl On the island in the middle of the lagoon, eastern shoreside Sw Sh Big Pearl Pearl Along the same shore Sw Sh Stardust Rare Candy On the same shore on the western side Sw Sh Soft Sand Honey On the central island, in some red flowers Sw Sh Galarica Twig On the same island next to the tree, close to some flowers Sw Fancy Apple Tart Apple Galarica Twig On the same island next to the tree, close to some flowers Sh Fancy Apple Sweet Apple Tart Apple Next to the same tree Sw Sweet Apple Next to the same tree Sh Dive Ball On the beach only island, next to the wall Sw Sh Dive Ball On the same island near the center Sw Sh Stardust Soft Sand Revive Further down the same island Sw Sh Max Revive Berry tree [ edit | edit source ] Shaking a Berry tree can yield Berries, but a Pokémon may be shaken loose instead and steal some of the Berries after a battle. As with every Berry tree on the Isle of Armor only accessible with the Rotom Bike 's Water Mode, the Berry tree in Loop Lagoon only gives out one of the friendship-raising Berries . On the island, on a cliff next to a Pokémon Den Item Location Games Qualot Berry Falls from the Berry tree Sw Sh
